meta.title: MoRoute | Safer Travel Intelligence for Every Journey
meta.description: Travel safer anywhere with live road alerts, safer route guidance, SOS support, and offline-ready tools.

hero.lede: On Nigerian roads, the danger is real — accidents, hold-ups, kidnap corridors, sudden road closures.
hero.ledeBold: The difference between a safe trip and a tragedy is often just knowing what’s ahead.
hero.reassure: MoRoute keeps you informed in real time — so you stay alert, choose safer routes, and arrive secure.

statsStrip.lbl: built to warn you before it’s too late

hero.footnote: Built for Nigeria. Made for our roads. Powered by people like you.
ticker: 5,289 Nigerians killed on the roads in 2025 — FRSC
₦2.2 trillion paid in ransom in 12 months — NBS
Abuja–Kaduna & Enugu–Port Harcourt flagged as active kidnap corridors

stats.label: Kidnapping cases documented globally in one recent year
Road traffic deaths globally each year

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need to plan safer trips, avoid risk, and get help fast.

items.name: Report Incident
items.description: Report suspicious activity, crashes, and roadblocks in seconds.

items.name: SOS Emergency
items.description: Send a one-tap SOS with your live location.

items.name: Community Reports
items.description: See real-time reports from nearby road users.

items.name: Route Planning
items.description: Compare routes by safety, time, and road conditions.

items.name: Checkpoint Verification
items.description: Identify verified checkpoints and avoid suspicious stops.

items.name: Trip Analytics
items.description: Review trip history and spot repeat risk patterns.

items.name: Safety Snapshots
items.description: Save location-tagged photo and video evidence quickly.

items.name: Live Safety Map
items.description: Track incidents and safer corridors on a live map.

threats.sectionTitle: Know the main road risks before you set out.

items.title: Kidnapping and Abduction
items.description: Remote or low-monitoring corridors can become abduction hotspots. Early alerts help you reroute sooner.

items.title: Highway Robbery and Armed Assault
items.description: Robberies often happen at choke points and fake checkpoints. Incident alerts help you avoid high-risk areas.

items.title: Violent Street and Transit Incidents
items.description: Assault and harassment risk can rise around transit points and unlit zones, especially at night.

items.title: Road Traffic Crashes and Serious Injuries
items.description: Poor visibility and unstable road conditions increase crash risk. Safer route suggestions reduce exposure.

cta.title: Download MoRoute
cta.description: Get safer route guidance, live road alerts, and one-tap emergency support.

contact.title: Need Help or Want to Partner?
contact.description: Send us a message. We usually respond within 24 hours.

form.messagePlaceholder: Share your question, feedback, or support request...
form.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. Our team will contact you shortly.

trustItems.title: One-tap SOS
trustItems.sub: Reach help and your contacts fast

footer.sources: Sources: Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC) 2025 Annual Road Traffic Crash Report — 10,446 crashes, 5,289 deaths; National Bureau of Statistics (NBS) Crime Experience & Security Perception Survey 2024 — 2.2m abductions, ₦2.2tn ransom paid (May 2023–Apr 2024); SBM Intelligence / road-corridor kidnapping analyses 2025. Figures shown for awareness; MoRoute provides community safety information, not a guarantee of safety.
